sentences.translation: Dijete je pročitalo: «Odsutni ima svoje opravdanje sa sobom».
sentences.translationEn: The child read: «The absent one has his excuse with him».

sentences.arabic: يَعْنِي هَذَا أَنَّنَا لَا نَحْكُمُ عَلَى مَنْ لَمْ نَسْمَعْ مِنْهُ.
sentences.translation: To znači da ne trebamo suditi onome od koga nismo čuli.
sentences.translationEn: This means we should not judge someone we have not heard from.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ زَمِيلٌ إِنَّ دَانَا تَأَخَّرَتْ بِدُونِ سَبَبٍ.
sentences.translation: Kolega je rekao da se Dana zakasnila bez razloga.
sentences.translationEn: A classmate said that Dana was late for no reason.

sentences.arabic: جَاءَتْ دَانَا وَشَرَحَتْ أَنَّ سَيَّارَةَ الْأُسْرَةِ تَعَطَّلَتْ.
sentences.translation: Dana je došla i objasnila da se porodični auto pokvario.
sentences.translationEn: Dana came and explained that the family car had broken down.
